name: uselink-skills
description: Agent skills for publishing engineering artifacts to uselink — repo summaries, PR digests, changelogs, API docs, onboarding guides, reports, and specs.
author: spartan-hieuvo

env.name: USELINK_CLI
env.description: The uselink CLI must be installed (npm install -g uselink) and configured (uselink login)

skills.name: uselink-publish
skills.description: Publish any Markdown or HTML file to uselink and get a shareable URL

skills.name: uselink-report
skills.description: Generate code review, architecture, or sprint reports as HTML and publish to uselink

skills.name: uselink-share-spec
skills.description: Publish planning specs from .planning/ to uselink for stakeholder review

skills.name: uselink-repo-summary
skills.description: Scan a GitHub repo, generate an architecture overview as HTML, and publish to uselink

skills.name: uselink-pr-digest
skills.description: Summarize a pull request as a stakeholder-friendly HTML page and publish to uselink

skills.name: uselink-changelog
skills.description: Generate release notes from git history and publish to uselink

skills.name: uselink-api-docs
skills.description: Scan backend controllers/routes, generate API documentation as HTML, and publish to uselink

skills.name: uselink-onboarding
skills.description: Scan a codebase, generate a new-developer onboarding guide, and publish to uselink

npxSkills.description: Install via npx skills CLI (auto-detects agent platform)

manual.description: Clone the repo and copy skills to your project's .claude/skills/ directory
